item.title: About
item.description: callsign: Abhishek Kumar student. developer. competitive programmer. building things, breaking things, learning along the way. currently flying with: linux + vim + i3wm c++ for competitive programming python for everything else markdown for notes and thoughts this site is my corner of the internet — thoughts, projects, and whatever else i feel like sharing.

item.title: First Flight
item.description: every journey starts somewhere. this is mine.

item.title: Projects
item.description: notes site my personal knowledge base, written in markdown and hosted online. visit → this site personal blog and portfolio built with Hugo. visit →
